description:
Gate the epic closed. Blocked by CF1, CF2a, F2b (F2b transitively covers F2a). CF2b is DEFERRED and intentionally NOT a blocker.

## Verify
- CF1 worker-crash test green; no mutated module survives an aborted parallel run.
- CF2a experimental warning present + documented.
- F2b per-mutant selection produces byte-identical kill/survive vs the full-suite baseline (the F2b correctness test), with the empty-index fallback exercised.
- Full suite green incl. e2e / downstream_integration; a parallel (--max-concurrency 2) e2e run completes without leaving global :cover/code-server/ExUnit state dirty.

## Done
- All Tier-1 child tickets closed and the above checks pass on the epic branch.
title: Capstone: Tier-1 verified — parallel-path correctness + per-mutant selection parity
